Package org.eventb.ui.tests

Class TestListMultimap

Unit test for class ListMultimap.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    getInexistentKey()
    Ensures that null is returned for a nonexistent key.
    void
    getKeyOneImage()
    Ensures that the appropriate value is returned for a key, and is not associated with another key.
    void
    getKeyTwiceSameImage()
    Ensures that the appropriate values are returned for a key (with duplicate values).
    void
    getKeyTwoImages()
    Ensures that the appropriate values are returned for a key.
    void

    Ensures that the appropriate values are returned for a key.

    • getInexistentKey

      Ensures that null is returned for a nonexistent key.

    • getKeyOneImage

      public void getKeyOneImage()
      Ensures that the appropriate value is returned for a key, and is not associated with another key.

      public void getKeyTwoImages()
      Ensures that the appropriate values are returned for a key.

      Ensures that the appropriate values are returned for a key (with duplicate values).
